attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks from Evolution Pokémon.

abilities.name: Kinesis
abilities.effect: When you play M Alakazam-EX from your hand to evolve this Pokémon, before it evolves, you may put 2 damage counters on your opponent's Active Pokémon and 3 damage counters on 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Suppression
attacks.effect: Put 3 damage counters on each of your opponent's Pokémon that has any Energy attached to it.

attacks.name: Zen Force
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 more damage for each damage counter on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Veil of Darkness
attacks.effect: Discard as many cards as you like from your hand. Then, draw that many cards.

attacks.name: Endgame
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Mega Evolution Pokémon is Knocked Out by damage from this attack, take 2 more Prize cards.

abilities.name: Drive Change
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may put a Pokémon Tool card attached to this Pokémon into your hand.

attacks.name: Rapid Blaster
attacks.effect: Discard as many Metal Energy attached to this Pokémon as you like. This attack does 20 more damage for each Energy card discarded in this way.

attacks.name: Mist Purge
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has any Special Energy attached to it, this attack does 30 more damage and heal 30 damage from each of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Big Storm
attacks.effect: Discard any Stadium card in play.

attacks.name: Dragon Trail
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 more damage for each basic Lightning Energy attached to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Powerful Gain
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon was healed during this turn, this attack does 60 more damage and heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Shining Wind
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon has no Weakness.

effect: Flip 2 coins. For each heads, discard 2 cards from the top of your opponent's deck.
name: Team Rocket's Handiwork
